title: Interpret Tipper Stats On The VISU_DATA Screen
summary: Use the Tipper Stats section on the VISU_DATA screen to identify left and right tipper counts, fault totals, average cycle time, average totes per hour, and time starved values.
when_to_use: Use this reference when an operator needs to read and interpret the Tipper Stats section on the VISU_DATA screen for left and right tipper processed tote counts, hospital-station counts, fault totals since last reset, average cycle time, average totes per hour, and time starved values.
not_for: Do not use this runbook to infer undocumented thresholds, acceptable ranges, or corrective actions from the displayed values.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Open the VISU_DATA screen and read the documented Tipper Stats values as displayed.

safety_notes: This is a reference procedure for reading HMI values only.
Do not infer undocumented thresholds or corrective actions from the displayed values.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the operator station HMI

access_required: Access to the operator station HMI
system_preconditions: VISU_DATA screen is available on the operator station HMI.
Tipper Stats section is visible and readable on the VISU_DATA screen.

visual_references.description: VISU_DATA screen showing the Tipper Stats section and overall screen layout.
Operator station display controls showing how to navigate to the VISU_DATA screen.

steps.title: Open VISU_DATA and locate Tipper Stats
steps.purpose: Access the HMI screen that contains the Tipper Stats values to be interpreted.
steps.instruction: Open the VISU_DATA screen on the operator station HMI and locate the Tipper Stats section.
steps.expected_result: The VISU_DATA screen is open and the Tipper Stats section is visible.
steps.healthy_condition: The Tipper Stats section and its labeled fields are present and readable on the VISU_DATA screen.
steps.failure_condition: The VISU_DATA screen cannot be opened, or the Tipper Stats section or labels are missing or unreadable.

actions.label: Open VISU_DATA screen
actions.exact_action: Open the VISU_DATA screen on the operator station HMI.

actions.label: Locate Tipper Stats
actions.exact_action: Locate the Tipper Stats section on the VISU_DATA screen.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The VISU_DATA screen layout and the Tipper Stats section with labeled fields.
The screen-navigation controls showing access to Visu_Data.

stop_or_escalate_if: Expected Tipper Stats fields are missing.
Tipper Stats labels or values are unreadable on the VISU_DATA screen.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The Tipper Stats section provides Totes Processed for left and right, counts sent to the Hospital Station, Faults since the last reset, Avg Cycle Time, Avg Totes/Hour, Time Starved, and a DATA RESET button.
F5 maps to Visu_Data and the Next Screen drop-down menu and display buttons navigate to the same screens.

steps.title: Read Totes Processed for the left tipper
steps.purpose: Identify the left tipper processed tote count and the count sent to the Hospital Station.
steps.instruction: Read the Totes Processed (Left) fields and identify how many totes have been processed and how many have been sent to the Hospital Station for the left tipper.
steps.expected_result: The left tipper processed tote count and left Hospital Station count are identified from the display.
steps.healthy_condition: Both left-side Totes Processed values are visible and can be read directly from the HMI.
steps.failure_condition: The left-side Totes Processed values are missing, unclear, or cannot be distinguished.

actions.label: Read left processed counts
actions.exact_action: Read the Totes Processed (Left) fields and identify how many totes have been processed and how many have been sent to the Hospital Station for the left tipper.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The left-side Tipper Stats fields for Totes Processed and the count sent to the Hospital Station.

stop_or_escalate_if: The left Totes Processed fields are missing or unreadable.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The Tipper Stats section provides Totes Processed for left and right and counts sent to the Hospital Station.

steps.title: Read Totes Processed for the right tipper
steps.purpose: Identify the right tipper processed tote count and the count sent to the Hospital Station.
steps.instruction: Read the Totes Processed (Right) fields and identify how many totes have been processed and how many have been sent to the Hospital Station for the right tipper.
steps.expected_result: The right tipper processed tote count and right Hospital Station count are identified from the display.
steps.healthy_condition: Both right-side Totes Processed values are visible and can be read directly from the HMI.
steps.failure_condition: The right-side Totes Processed values are missing, unclear, or cannot be distinguished.

actions.label: Read right processed counts
actions.exact_action: Read the Totes Processed (Right) fields and identify how many totes have been processed and how many have been sent to the Hospital Station for the right tipper.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The right-side Tipper Stats fields for Totes Processed and the count sent to the Hospital Station.

stop_or_escalate_if: The right Totes Processed fields are missing or unreadable.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The Tipper Stats section provides Totes Processed for left and right and counts sent to the Hospital Station.

steps.title: Read left and right fault totals
steps.purpose: Identify the number of faults recorded for each tipper since the last reset.
steps.instruction: Read the Faults (Left/Right) fields and identify how many faults have occurred on each tipper since the last reset.
steps.expected_result: Left and right fault totals since the last reset are identified from the display.
steps.healthy_condition: Both left and right fault fields are visible and readable.
steps.failure_condition: One or both fault fields are missing, unreadable, or unclear.

actions.label: Read fault totals
actions.exact_action: Read the Faults (Left/Right) fields and identify how many faults have occurred on each tipper since the last reset.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The Faults fields for the left and right tippers in the Tipper Stats section.

stop_or_escalate_if: The left or right fault totals are missing or unreadable.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The Tipper Stats section provides Faults since the last reset.

steps.title: Interpret average cycle time
steps.purpose: Understand what the Avg Cycle Time value represents on the HMI.
steps.instruction: Read the Avg Cycle Time value and interpret it as the average time from when the gripper takes hold of the tote until it releases it back to the AGV.
steps.expected_result: The Avg Cycle Time value is identified and interpreted using the documented definition.
steps.healthy_condition: The Avg Cycle Time field is visible and the operator interprets it using the source definition only.
steps.failure_condition: The Avg Cycle Time field is missing, unreadable, or interpreted using assumptions not supported by the source.

actions.label: Read average cycle time
actions.exact_action: Read the Avg Cycle Time value and interpret it as the average time from when the gripper takes hold of the tote until it releases it back to the AGV.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The Avg Cycle Time field in the Tipper Stats section.

stop_or_escalate_if: The Avg Cycle Time field is missing or unreadable.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The Tipper Stats section provides Avg Cycle Time.

steps.title: Interpret average totes per hour
steps.purpose: Understand what the Avg Totes/Hour value represents on the HMI.
steps.instruction: Read the Avg Totes/Hour value and interpret it as the average number of totes processed at 15-minute intervals.
steps.expected_result: The Avg Totes/Hour value is identified and interpreted using the documented definition.
steps.healthy_condition: The Avg Totes/Hour field is visible and the operator interprets it using the source definition only.
steps.failure_condition: The Avg Totes/Hour field is missing, unreadable, or interpreted using assumptions not supported by the source.

actions.label: Read average totes per hour
actions.exact_action: Read the Avg Totes/Hour value and interpret it as the average number of totes processed at 15-minute intervals.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The Avg Totes/Hour field in the Tipper Stats section.

stop_or_escalate_if: The Avg Totes/Hour field is missing or unreadable.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The Tipper Stats section provides Avg Totes/Hour.

steps.title: Interpret time starved
steps.purpose: Understand what the Time Starved value represents and how it resets.
steps.instruction: Read the Time Starved value and interpret it as the length of time the tipper has been waiting for a tote, noting that it resets after each tote.
steps.expected_result: The Time Starved value is identified and interpreted using the documented definition.
steps.healthy_condition: The Time Starved field is visible and the operator interprets it as waiting time for a tote that resets after each tote.
steps.failure_condition: The Time Starved field is missing, unreadable, or interpreted using assumptions not supported by the source.

actions.label: Read time starved
actions.exact_action: Read the Time Starved value and interpret it as the length of time the tipper has been waiting for a tote, noting that it resets after each tote.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The Time Starved field in the Tipper Stats section.

stop_or_escalate_if: The Time Starved field is missing or unreadable.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The Tipper Stats section provides Time Starved.

success_criteria: The user can correctly identify and interpret the documented Tipper Stats values for both tippers.
The user reads only source-defined meanings for Totes Processed, Hospital Station counts, Faults since last reset, Avg Cycle Time, Avg Totes/Hour, and Time Starved.
healthy_conditions: VISU_DATA screen is accessible on the operator station HMI.
Tipper Stats fields are visible and readable.
Left and right tipper values can be distinguished.
Values are interpreted using the documented field meanings only.
failure_conditions: Expected Tipper Stats fields are missing or unreadable on the VISU_DATA screen.
The operator cannot distinguish left and right tipper values.
The operator attempts to apply undocumented thresholds, acceptable ranges, or corrective actions.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if expected Tipper Stats fields are missing or unreadable on the VISU_DATA screen.
Escalate for SME review if interpretation beyond the documented field meanings is required.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: VISU_DATA screen and Tipper Stats section.

source_refs.quote_or_summary: The Tipper Stats section provides Totes Processed for left and right, counts sent to the Hospital Station, Faults since the last reset, Avg Cycle Time, Avg Totes/Hour, Time Starved, and a DATA RESET button.

missing_details: The source packet does not provide acceptable ranges or thresholds for any Tipper Stats values.
The source packet does not provide corrective actions based on Tipper Stats values.
The source packet does not provide an estimated completion time.
The source packet does not state whether production stop or LOTO is required, though this runbook is reference-only.
The source packet references a DATA RESET button but does not define its use as part of this candidate procedure.
